effect.notes: Release a scent that attracts or repels specific creatures within 15m.

description.value: Carnivorous plants use this mutation to lure prey. The plant releases a powerful fragrance that can drift as far as 10 kilometers when the wind is favorable. Anyone who smells it believes the plant is their favorite food. Once drawn within 30 meters, a creature does nothing but walk straight toward the plant unless it makes a saving throw against intensity 8 poison that attracts rather than kills.
